title: [Vic's Point Blank] Iconic 80s-90s Guns
description: A Vic's Point Blank content pack that adds 4 iconic guns from various media from the 80s and 90s
body:
This is a Vic's Point Blank content pack that adds 4 iconic guns from various 80s-90s media:

- The Auto 9 from RoboCop
- A left-handed double barrel shotgun held similar to that in Evil Dead
- PP7 Special Issue from GoldenEye 007 on the N64
- Model 1887 used like it was in Terminator 2

This project was commissioned by ALk2106
